headline: United Rentals Introduces AI-Powered Equipment Agent
summary: STAMFORD, Conn., March 12, 2026--United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE: URI) today announced the launch of the Equipment Agent, a first-of-its-kind AI-powered equipment recommendation solution designed specifically for the equipment rental industry. The new digital assistant helps customers discover, compare and select the right equipment for their projects by delivering instant, intelligent equipment rental guidance online.
